    C

    canSeePrivate(Question, DatabaseHelper.PrivateMessage) - Method in class application.StudentQAPage
    Method to determine whether a user can see a private message.
    canSubmit - Variable in class application.InputValidator.ValidationReport
     
    canSubmit() - Method in class application.InputValidator.ValidationReport
    Gets canSumbit
    changeUserRole(String, String) - Method in class application.UserDatabaseUI
    Method to change a user's role.
    checkAllCaps(String, SpellChecker.ValidationResult) - Static method in class application.SpellChecker
    Checks for all caps text (considered shouting)
    checkBasicGrammar(String, SpellChecker.ValidationResult) - Static method in class application.SpellChecker
    Checks for basic grammar issues.
    checkPunctuation(String, SpellChecker.ValidationResult) - Static method in class application.SpellChecker
    Checks for excessive punctuation
    checkRepeatedWords(String, SpellChecker.ValidationResult) - Static method in class application.SpellChecker
    Checks for repeated words
    checkSpelling(String, SpellChecker.ValidationResult) - Static method in class application.SpellChecker
    Enhanced spell checking with edit distance for suggestions.
    cleanup() - Static method in class application.QASystemTest
    Closes the connection to the database.
    closeConnection() - Method in class databasePart1.DatabaseHelper
    Closes database connection
    closeQuestion(int, String) - Method in class databasePart1.DatabaseHelper
    Closes a question (marks as resolved).
    closeQuestion(Question) - Method in class application.StudentQAPage
    Method to mark a question as resolved (close it).
    COMMON_MISSPELLINGS - Static variable in class application.SpellChecker
    Common misspellings mapped to correct spellings

    Method to connect to database

    Creates the all questions tab where all questions in the database will be displayed.

    Creates a new answer in the database.

    Creates the question tab where a user can ask questions.

    The date and time when the review was created.

    The date and time when the reply was created.

    createFollowupQuestion(int, String, String, String) - Method in class databasePart1.DatabaseHelper
    Creates a follow up question to another question (Child question to a parent question).

    Creates the question card for each question displayed in the my questions tab.
    createMyQuestionsTab() - Method in class application.StudentQAPage
    Creates the question tab where a user can view their questions.

    Creates tables in database for questions, answers, private messages, answer feedback, reviews, and review replies.

    Creates a new question in the database.
